About.title: Trusted Partner in Global Cashew Trade
About.description1: Homie D'Lion Group is committed to providing premium Raw Cashew Nuts, Cashew Kernels, and reliable logistics solutions to customers worldwide.
About.description2: Our focus is transparency, long-term partnerships, and market intelligence that helps clients make better business decisions.

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.heading: Built with Trust and Effort
AboutPage.heroDescription: Connecting trusted partners across the global cashew industry through integrity, market knowledge and long-term relationships.
AboutPage.paragraph1: Homie D'Lion was founded with the vision of connecting Vietnamese cashew processors with trusted raw cashew nut suppliers in Africa, as well as reliable cashew kernel buyers around the world. Our goal is to bring Vietnamese cashews closer to consumers across international markets.
AboutPage.paragraph2: Throughout more than five years of development, we have remained deeply grateful to the partners and customers who have placed their trust in Homie D'Lion. Their support has strengthened our journey and inspired us to create lasting economic value, build meaningful partnerships and contribute positively to the community.
AboutPage.missionDescription: To become a trusted bridge between Vietnamese cashew processors, raw cashew nut suppliers, kernel buyers and logistics partners worldwide.
AboutPage.visionDescription: To contribute to a transparent and sustainable global supply chain while bringing Vietnamese cashews closer to consumers around the world.
AboutPage.value1Description: Honouring commitments with transparency and long-term partnership.
AboutPage.value2Description: Building strong relationships between suppliers, processors, buyers and logistics partners.
AboutPage.value3Description: Supporting every business decision with practical experience and market intelligence.
AboutPage.value4Description: Growing together with our partners while creating positive impact for the community.
AboutPage.whyTitle: Supporting Every Stage of the Transaction
AboutPage.whyDescription: We go beyond making the initial connection by supporting partners with market information, coordination and practical trade experience throughout the transaction process.
AboutPage.why1Description: Connecting with raw cashew nut suppliers across key sourcing regions in Africa.
AboutPage.why2Description: Understanding the needs of Vietnamese processors and the operational realities of the local market.
AboutPage.why3Description: Supporting Vietnamese processors and exporters in connecting with suitable cashew kernel buyers worldwide.
AboutPage.why4Description: Working with logistics partners to support international cargo movements and delivery coordination.
AboutPage.timeline2019Description: Homie Cashews was established with the vision of connecting Vietnamese cashew processors with trusted raw cashew suppliers across West Africa.
AboutPage.timeline2023Description: Officially opened offices in Ho Chi Minh City and Phuoc Binh, Binh Phuoc to better serve customers, partners and Vietnamese cashew processors.
AboutPage.timeline2025Description: Officially rebranded as Homie D'Lion Group, expanding into cashew trading, logistics, market intelligence and community initiatives.
AboutPage.timelineTodayDescription: Continuing to expand our global network while creating sustainable value for the cashew industry.
